properties.notes:
**Property 1 - Old Residence**

Owned from 1 Jan 2010 to 15 Oct 2024 (14.79 years). Overlapped with new residence for 165 days (1 May 2024 to 15 Oct 2024) which is within the 6-month limit under s118-140 ITAA 1997.

user_query: Batch 1,2,3 - Scenario 5: Moving Between Main Residences (6-Month Overlap) - Sold old residence at 78 Rose Street, Brisbane after 14.79 years, purchased new residence at 33 Mountain View Road with 165-day overlap

additional_info.expected_outcome: NO CGT PAYABLE - 6-month overlap rule applies (s118-140 ITAA 1997)
